page.title: Book Publishing
page.subtitle: End-to-end publishing production services, from digitization to interactive eBooks, delivered with speed, quality, and clean structured outputs.

trustMetrics.heading: Publishing teams choose us for speed + reliability
trustMetrics.subheading: Real publishing outcomes that help you deliver faster, maintain quality, and scale with confidence.

stats.label: Projects delivered
stats.hint: Digitization, conversion, layout and interactive builds — end-to-end delivery.

stats.label: QA pass rate

stats.label: Publishing partners
stats.hint: Publishers, institutes and content teams with recurring production needs.

servicesCarousel.heading: Services & capabilities
servicesCarousel.subheading: Explore our services through a guided carousel — each capability clearly highlights deliverables, quality standards, and turnaround timelines.

slides.title: Document Digitization & Scanning
slides.desc: We convert printed books, journals, and archives into high-quality digital formats that are searchable, clean, and production-ready.

slides.title: Copyediting & Proofreading
slides.desc: We refine language, clarity, and consistency to ensure your content is accurate, polished, and ready for publication.

slides.title: eBook Conversion
slides.desc: We convert print content into EPUB, Kindle, and fixed-layout formats with full device compatibility and validation.

slides.title: XML/HTML Conversion
slides.desc: We transform content into structured XML and HTML5 formats for web publishing and multi-platform distribution.

slides.title: Typesetting & Layout Design
slides.desc: We design professional interiors with clear hierarchy, precise layouts, and production-ready formatting for both print and digital.

slides.title: Metadata Creation & Tagging
slides.desc: We create accurate metadata to improve discoverability, search visibility, and platform-ready cataloging.

slides.title: Multimedia Integration
slides.desc: We integrate audio, video, and animations to make learning content more engaging and platform-ready.

slides.title: Interactive eBook Development
slides.desc: We build fixed-layout interactive eBooks with read-aloud features, quizzes, and engaging user interactions.

slides.title: Print-on-Demand (POD) Preparation
slides.desc: We validate layouts for print compliance, ensuring correct margins, trim, bleed, and print-ready output.

slides.title: Magazine & Newspaper Digitization
slides.desc: We convert legacy magazine and newspaper archives into searchable digital collections for long-term preservation and access.

contactCta.heading: Ready to discuss your publishing workflow?
contactCta.subheading: Share your volume, formats (EPUB/XML/HTML5/PDF), and timelines, and we’ll recommend a clear delivery plan with defined quality checkpoints.
